attacks.name: Voltaic Chain
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each {L} Energy attached to all of your Iono's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Electromagnetic Catapult
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Megaton Fall
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 40 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Toge Spark
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Flashing Draw
abilities.effect: You must discard a Basic {L} Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Purging Strike
attacks.effect: You may discard your hand. If you discarded any cards in this way, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: Cursed Words
attacks.effect: Your opponent chooses 3 cards from their hand and shuffles those cards into their deck.

attacks.name: Zapping Short
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If you discarded a Pokémon Tool in this way, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

abilities.name: Electric Streamer
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic {L} Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Iono's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderous Bolt
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Linked Lightning
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Thump-Thump Boom
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 100 damage to itself. Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Mimic
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a card for each card in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Psy Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Victory Symbol
attacks.effect: If you use this attack when you have exactly 1 Prize card remaining, you win this game.

attacks.name: Conjoined Beams
attacks.effect: If Beldum and Metang are on your Bench, this attack does 150 more damage.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hold Still
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Inviting Wink
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may have your opponent reveal their hand and you put any number of Basic Pokémon you find there onto their Bench.

attacks.name: Inviting Flowers
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for any number of Basic Lillie's Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Fade Out
attacks.effect: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Confectionary Gift
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Mammoth Hauler
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Rumbling March
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 more damage for each Stage 2 Pokémon on your Bench.

attacks.name: Shadowy Knot
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage for each {C} in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Mischievous Hands
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon and put 3 damage counters on each of them.

attacks.name: Ghostly Trip
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

abilities.name: Rock Armor
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any Energy attached, it takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Breaching Lariat
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Dig It Up
attacks.effect: Look at the top card of your deck. You may discard that card.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Focus Fist
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

abilities.name: Spike-Clad
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may attach up to 2 Spiky Energy cards from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Clamping Fangs
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Turf Maker
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Stadium card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Secret Forest Path
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost is {C}{C} less.

attacks.name: Rumble
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Break Ground
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Daunting Gaze
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't play any Item cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Cracking Stomp
attacks.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Pervasive Gas
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Crazy Blast
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon used Pervasive Gas during your last turn, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Torment
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't use that attack.

attacks.name: Power Tackle
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Snipping Pincers
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 120 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Spinning Gears
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Drop Shot
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Thieving Swipe
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you choose a card you find there and put it on the bottom of their deck.

attacks.name: Iron Buster
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Bounding Bite
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Auto Heal
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever you attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, heal 90 damage from that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spike Draw
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Shoot Through
attacks.effect: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Steel Wing
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 60 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Insta-Strike
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Brave Slash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Brave Slash.

attacks.name: Dragon's Fury
attacks.effect: Attach a Basic {R} Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your {N} Pokémon.

attacks.name: Wide Blast
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Dragon Impact
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Extra Helpings
abilities.effect: Attacks used by your Hop's Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). The effect of Extra Helpings doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Dynamic Press
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 80 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Tenacious Tail
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon ex in play.

attacks.name: Destructive Drill
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fruit Bearing
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Beckon
attacks.effect: Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Rapid Draw
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Stealth Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Slumbering Smack
attacks.effect: Both Active Pokémon are now Asleep. During your next turn, attacks used by this Pokémon do 100 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Gluttonous Tail
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

abilities.name: Tuning Echo
abilities.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, ignore all Energy in the cost of Frightening Howl used by this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Frightening Howl
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Ceaseless Spitting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

abilities.name: Defiant Horn
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

attacks.name: Intimidating Stare
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Fickle Spitting
attacks.effect: If your opponent doesn't have exactly 3 or 4 Prize cards remaining, this attack does nothing.
